videos.title: [속보] "이란, 호르무즈 대체항로 발표…기뢰 가능성 회피 목적"/"하루 10여 척 통과 제한, 통행료 징수도 계획"/2026년 4월 9일(목)/KBS
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 이ран은 호르무즈 해협을 통과할 선박의 수를 10여척으로 제한하고, 사전 조율와 함께 통행료를 내고 정해진 항로만 따르도록 하는 계획을 세우고 있다.
2. 이란과 함께 해합 통행료는 암호화폐나 중국 위안화로 지급할 예정이며, 이슬람 혁명 수비대는 라크섬 인근을 지나는 두 가지 특정 항을 거쳐야 하는 조건으로 통과를 요구한다.
3. 미국은 이란과 공동으로 해합 통행료를 징수할 경우 큰 파장을 예상되며, 이는 휴전 합의 후에도 호르무지 해협을 통제하는 방안으로 보인다.

videos.title: 호르무즈 폐쇄 ‘강제 회항’…이란, 대체항로 발표 [9시 뉴스] / KBS  2026.04.09.
videos.subtitle_summary: 호르무즈 해협이 다시 폐쇄되었습니다. 유조선 '오로라오'는 중간에 뱃리를 돌려서 해협을 통과하지 못했습니다. 이스라엘의 레바논 공격으로 인한 휴전 조항 위반으로 인해 혁명 수비대는 모든 선박을 통행 중단시키고, 대체항로를 제시했습니다. 이 대체항로는 라라크섬 위로 나가거나 아래로 지나야 합니다. 이란은 해상 안전을 보장하고 기회와의 충돌을 방지하기 위해 대체항로를 발표했다는 주장이 있습니다. TBS뉴스 1항입니다.

videos.title: Hormuz Virtually Closed on First Day of Ceasefire… Iran Announces Alternative Route and Pushes fo...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. The Strait of Hormuz, a crucial oil shipping route, is effectively closed despite the ceasefire between Iran and the U.S. Iran has proposed allowing 10 ships per day to pass through the strait under the supervision of their own military forces.
2. Iran has also suggested an alternative route through the Gulf of Oman and the Arabian Sea as a potential bypass for oil tankers. This route would involve entering the Gulf of Oman from Oman, passing through the Strait of Hormuz's southern end, and exiting back into the Arabian Sea via the Strait of Bab el-Mandeb.
3. Iran has also proposed a cryptocurrency payment system for ships passing through the strait to ensure continuous control over oil shipments even after the ceasefire. This move is seen as an attempt to maintain financial resources for regime survival amidst concerns about post-war government stability.

videos.title: [속보] 이란, 호르무즈 대체항로 발표···"호르무즈 해협 전면 폐쇄, 유조선 강제 회항" [무조건 간다 LIVE]
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 트럼프 대통령이 이란과 2주간 휴전을 수용하고, 이란도 동의하였다.
2. 이란은 미국과 협상을 진행할 예정이며, 이를 금요일에 진행할 것으로 보고 있다.
3. 이 전쟁의 종결은 미국의 군사적 성과와 정치적 부담, 그리고 이란 혁명 수비대의 한계에서 나온 것으로 보인다.

videos.title: Iran Announces Alternative Route to Hormuz... "10 Ships Pass Daily" - [LIVE] MBC 5 PM News and Ec...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 미국과 이ран의 휴전 조정이 한 달 지난 이후, 호르무즈 해협에서 선박 통행은 여전히 원활하지 않습니다.
2. 이ран은 호르무즈 해협을 통과할 수 있는 선박 수를 제한하기로 결정했으며, 이용해야 할 대치향로를 발표했습니다.
3. 이스라엘은 최근 친이란 무장정파 헤스볼라에 대한 공격을 퍼부었으며, 이는 이ран의 호르무즈 해협 통항과 관련된 문제로 발생했습니다.

videos.title: Iran Holds Tight Hold on to 'Hormuz' Despite Ceasefire... "Only 10 Ships Allowed Per Day" What Ab...
videos.subtitle_summary: Iran continues to control the Strait of Hormuz despite a ceasefire, limiting the number of ships passing through each day to around 10. They require ships to coordinate with the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps and pay fees in cryptocurrency or Chinese yuan. The strait was previously used by about 135 ships per day, but only a few ships were able to pass through on the day of the ceasefire declaration. Despite the truce, tensions remain due to reports of Israeli attacks on Lebanon and Iran's counter-attacks. Iran is reportedly planning to formalize this control system, allowing passage for their or friendly countries' ships at lower costs, while blocking ships connected to the U.S. or Israel. The shipping routes must also use narrow straits, and fees are applied differently, with supertankers potentially facing up to 30 billion won in fees. Seven Iranian supertankers and 26 of our ships were held, prompting discussions on strategies for passing through the strait. Experts predict that it will take a significant amount of time for shipping to return to normal if Iran does not clearly provide safety guarantees. (SBS News)

videos.title: [핫라인] 이란, 호르무즈 내 대체항로 제시···선박 통제 강화하나?
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 이란이 호르무즈 해협에서 대체 항로를 제시했다. 이는 해협을 안전하게 통과할 수 있도록 위험 지역을 알려주고, 실제로는 이란 해군의 직접 통제 아래로 모든 선박을 놓고자 하는 것으로 보인다.
2. 이란은 호르무즈 해협을 자신들의 영해처럼 관리하기 위한 전략적 포석으로, 국제법상 항행의 자유를 무력화하고 통행세를 받아내려는 의도가 있다.
3. 이란이 미국과의 휴전 협정에 따라 해협을 통행량을 12척으로 제한하고, 암호화폐나 중국 위하화를 통해 통행료를 부과하기도 했다고 보도되었다.

videos.title: 이란 "하루 10척만"‥종전까지 해협 통제 유지? (2026.04.09/12MBC뉴스)
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 이ран은 일주일에 10여척 수준으로 호르무제협을 통과하는 선박 수를 제한하기로 했습니다.
2. 이란 이슬람 혁명 수비대는 기회 충돌을 피하기 위해 새로운 항로를 발표했으며, 사전 회배를 거치고 선박 10여척만 통행할 계획입니다.
3. 이란은 암호화폐나 중국 외화로 사전 회한 통행료를 지급받을 계획으로, 해적 일례와의 충돌을 방지하기 위해 이용할 대창로를 발표했습니다.

videos.title: [뉴스퀘어10] 이란 "호르무즈 폐쇄, 대체항로"...휴전 '아슬아슬' / YTN
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 미국과 이란은 2주 동안의 휴전에 합의했으나 호르무즈 해협 상태는 여전히 불안하다.
2. 이란이 레바논에 반발하여 이스라엘이 레바논을 공격했고, 이를 반발해서 호르무즈를 다시 폐쇄했다.
3. 현재 상황에서 완전한 자유항행과 통행은 생각하기 어렵고, 새로운 대체 향로가 필요할 수 있다는 것으로 보인다.

videos.title: [Today's News] Democratic Party Seoul Candidate "Jeong Won-oh Confirmed"... 'No Surprise' Advance...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. The Democratic Party of Korea has announced Jeong Won-oh as the Seoul mayoral candidate for the upcoming local elections.
2. Since Jeong received more than half of the votes in the primary election, there will be no runoff vote and he is confirmed as the final candidate.
3. Jeong Won-oh has been selected as the Democratic Party's candidate for the Seoul mayoral position in the upcoming local elections. (This summary combines the last two sentences from the original script.)

videos.title: [Breaking] Jeong Won-oh Confirmed as Democratic Party of Korea’s Seoul Mayoral Candidate… Secures...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Jeong Won-oh has been confirmed as the Democratic Party of Korea's candidate for Seoul Mayor in the upcoming election.
2. Since he received more than half of the votes in the primary election, there will be no runoff vote and Jeong Won-oh is now officially the party's candidate for Seoul Mayor.
3. The final result of the Democratic Party's primary election for Seoul Mayor was announced, with Jeong Won-oh being selected as the winner.

videos.title: Seoul's Jeong Won-oh and Busan's Jeon Jae-soo Confirmed as Democratic Party Candidates... Bickeri...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Seoul's Jeong Won-oh, former head of the Seoul District Office, and Busan's Jeon Jae-soo, a member of the National Assembly, have been confirmed as candidates for the mayoral election of their respective cities by the Democratic Party. The party has now completed candidate selection in 10 out of 16 regional districts, with the remaining areas expected to finish soon. The focus is shifting towards the by-election for the Seoul Metropolitan Council, known as Bo-Gyeon.
2. Jeong Won-oh, the Democratic Party's Seoul mayoral candidate, won despite controversies such as a scandal involving a public opinion poll and a campaign promise box. He expressed confidence in his victory with the support of the Democratic Party on SNS after his nomination.
3. The focus is now on the by-election for the Seoul Metropolitan Council (Bo-Gyeon). The most notable areas include potential candidacies from representatives of the Justice Party and the People's Party in Busan's Buk-gu district. The Democratic Party has requested the participation of Ha Jung-woo, a senior AI expert at the Blue House, but there is a cold response from the Blue House.

videos.title: [On-site Video] "Jeong Won-oh Confirmed as Seoul Mayoral Candidate"... "Majority Votes Secured" N...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Jeong Won-oh has been confirmed as the Seoul Mayoral candidate for the Democratic Party of Korea, securing a majority vote in the primary election.
2. According to the party's rules, the exact voting results will not be disclosed, but since Jeong Won-oh received more than half of the votes, no runoff election is needed.
3. Therefore, Jeong Won-oh has been officially selected as the Democratic Party's candidate for the Seoul Mayoral election in the upcoming simultaneous national and local elections.

videos.title: *선공개* [정원오 Part .1] 드디어 입 열었다! 칸쿤 동행 직원의 진실 🏖️ 정원오가 직접 밝히는 고속 승진 의혹

videos.title: [Subtitled News] Daejeon is in an uproar... The zoo that called it a 'baby' wolf / KBS 2026.04.09.
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. A large wolf-like animal, weighing around 30kg and approximately two years old, escaped from the Daejeon Zoo on April 9th, 2026. It was initially spotted in a city neighborhood near a construction site. The zoo confirmed that it had escaped around 9:15 AM by digging under a fence in the safari area.
2. After the escape, the zoo immediately closed off entry and initiated a search operation. The wolf-like animal was captured about two hours later, 1.6km away from the zoo, near a local elementary school.
3. The police deployed additional personnel in the vicinity of the nearby elementary school during school hours due to potential harm. The authorities also prepared hazardous materials and a special police squad for possible emergency situations as part of the nighttime search operation. This is not the first time an animal has escaped from Daejeon Zoo; in 2018, a hyena was killed after escaping from the same zoo entrance and roaming freely for about four hours.
